name: 20"x30" Modern Colorblock Tufted Bath Rug - Threshold™
description:
Step out of the shower and into luxurious comfort with this Modern Colorblock Tufted Bath Rug from Threshold™. The tufted bath rug is crafted from cotton fabric to provide soft underfoot comfort as you step out of the bath or shower. Designed with a classic colorblock pattern, you can place it by the tub or in front of the sink to bring style and convenient comfort to your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
